questions.question: MySQL, by default, runs on port # ___________
USE keyword is used in mysql to select a ___________
Which of the following options tells mysql to ask for entering the password?
_______ is the Security limitation of the HTTP 1.1?
questions.description: Correct answer: D. All of the Above

questions.question: SELECT EXTRACT(WEEK FROM "2021-01-15"); This query will return _____ as output.
options: You have an error in your SQL syntax;

questions.question: SELECT EXTRACT(MINUTE FROM "2021-06-01 09:32:21"); This query will return _____ as output.
options: You have an error in your SQL syntax;

questions.question: Which of the following is not a sniffing tool?
questions.description: Correct answer: B. John the Ripper

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT an HTTP response code category?
What is the attack technique used to exploit web sites by altering backend database queries through inputting manipulated queries?
With using XSS, attacker can __________
questions.description: Correct answer: D. All of the above

questions.question: ______ vulnerability is dropped in OWASP-2017 from OWASP-2013.
questions.description: Correct answer: B. Unvalidated Redirects and Forwards

questions.question: A Web site that allows users to enter text/script, such as a comment or a name, and then stores it and later displays it to other users, is potentially vulnerable to what kind of attack?
Which of the following is a DAST tool used to find security flaw and vulnerability hidden inside the code?
Which Google hack would display all pages that have words Software and Version in their titles?
questions.description: Correct answer: B. allintitle: software version

questions.question: Which of the following tool is used to scan a web-server for the vulnerability that can be exploited and can compromise the server?
What is the syntax for Wireshark wireless Beacon Filter?
Rogue access point attack also known as:
Without the use of an access point, which wireless mode connects machines directly to one-another?
Android is licensed under ___________
Adb Stands For ___________.
questions.description: Correct answer: A. Android Debug Bridge.

questions.question: Mobile security is also known as ____________
______ is not included in OWASP Top 10 Mobile vulnerability.
On a device, the best way to avoid malware is?
questions.description: Correct answer: C. Install trusted apps only

questions.question: Which type of communication is the easiest way to deliver a wipe command to a mobile device?
Python was Designed by
questions.description: Correct answer: C. Guido van Rossum

questions.question: Which of the following commands can be used to verify a python installation on a Linux instance?

The value of b in the following example:
>>> a = [1,2,3,4]
>>> a
[1, 2, 3, 4]
>>> b = a.append(5)
>>> print b
Everything in Python is a(n) _____________.
Which of the following return a quick list of the defined symbols in python?
Which of the following functions returns a dictionary mapping group names to group numbers?
When does the TCP socket connection goes into the TIME_WAIT state?
options: When client does not close the connection
Packets arriving in correct working order
When client closes the connection abnormally
Connection request goes into a queue
questions.description: Correct answer: C. When client closes the connection abnormally

questions.question: Which of the following is False?
options: lower() function in string is used to return a string by converting the whole given string into lowercase.
capitalize() function in string is used to return a string by converting the whole given string into uppercase.
questions.description: Correct answer: C. capitalize() function in string is used to return a string by converting the whole given string into uppercase.

questions.question: Which of the following data type value returns by Built-in function all()?
What is the difference between the TCP and UDP protocols?
options: TCP is compatible with Python, while UDP is not
TCP is connection-oriented, while UDP is not
TCP is not connection-oriented, while UDP is
questions.description: Correct answer: B. TCP is connection-oriented, while UDP is not

questions.question: Asterisk in regular expression is used to match _______.
questions.description: Correct answer: C. Zero or more occurrences

questions.question: Which of the following is the use of function in python?
options: Functions are reusable pieces of programs
Functions don't provide better modularity for your application
you can't also create your own functions
questions.description: Correct answer: A. Functions are reusable pieces of programs

options: The program will throw an error as constructor can't have default arguments
The program will throw an error as display function doesn't have parameters.
questions.description: Correct answer: D. "Hello CDAC" is printed

questions.question: In python, what is method inside class?
A for loop on a dictionary iterates over its ___________ by default.

What is the output of the following?
>>> print dict
{'a': 'alpha', 'c': 'z', 'b': 'bravo'}
>>> type(dict.items())
_______________
The sys module is an _________ which has (among other things) an ________ called path.
Which of the following statements best describes a white-hat hacker?
Which phase is performed next after gaining the access of computer by attacker?
Which of the following is a set of changes done to any program or its associated data designed for updating, fixing, or improving it.
__________ is the specific search engine for exploits where anyone can find all the exploits associated to vulnerability.
What are the forms of password cracking techniques?
questions.description: Correct answer: D. All of the above

questions.question: Command to perform an Nmap XMAS scan every 15mins:
Which of the following replicate itself and do not require a computer program to attach itself.
The purpose of a shadow honeypot is ______
options: to combine filtering, anomaly detection systems and honeypots in a way that exploits the best features of these mechanisms
to enhance accuracy of conventional hotspot
to note attacks against known vulnerabilities
questions.description: Correct answer: A. to combine filtering, anomaly detection systems and honeypots in a way that exploits the best features of these mechanisms

questions.question: ______ is the tool useful in sorting through large logs files while searching for intrusion-related events.
questions.description: Correct answer: A. Intrusion Detection System

questions.question: A ______ is a "Good" guy who uses his skills for defensive purposes.
questions.description: Correct answer: C. White Hat hacker

questions.question: Which one of the following is not a type of DOS attack?
questions.description: Correct answer: D. Network DOS attack

questions.question: _______ is the first computer worm distributed via the internet.
_______ is not the protocol susceptible to sniffing.

An ethical hacker is performing a penetration test on a web application. The hacker finds a user input field on a web form and enters a single quotation mark. The website responds with a server error. What does the error indicate?
options: The web application is susceptible to SQL injection attacks.
The web application is not susceptible to SQL injection attacks.
The server is experiencing a denial of service.
questions.description: Correct answer: A. The web application is susceptible to SQL injection attacks.

questions.question: Which of the following is possible when scanning UDP ports?
options: An ICMP message will be returned
The four-way handshake will not be completed
An RFC 1294 message will be returned
questions.description: Correct answer: B. An ICMP message will be returned

questions.question: What is "Botnet"?
questions.description: Correct answer: A. Network of Zombies

questions.question: Which malware is used to gain administrative rights to one's computer?
What is the Ping of Death?
options: Sending packets that, when reassembled, are too large for the system to understand
Sending very large packets that cause a buffer overflow
Sending packets very quickly to fill up the receiving buffer
Sending a TCP packet with the fragment offset out of bounds
questions.description: Correct answer: A. Sending packets that, when reassembled, are too large for the system to understand
